query: Users are reporting that their cart total shows the wrong price intermittently. It only happens sometimes.
expected_behavior: Refuses to apply a fix before building a reproduction case
Lists at least 3 hypotheses for the intermittent failure (race condition, caching bug, floating-point arithmetic)
Designs a reproduction script that triggers the failure deterministically (e.g. rapid add-to-cart, specific item combination)
Does not add console.log statements to production before reproducing the bug in a controlled environment
Checks learnings.jsonl for prior cart-related bugs before starting investigation
